_note: Operational settings for the sourcing pipeline. Signal points and ageing live in scoring.json, never here.

shortlist._note: The desk is what matters, not company HQ. Default view: UK-based people plus location-unclassified (flagged); --world shows everything. Only a KNOWN-foreign marker (foreign_location_terms) banks a name; a location matching neither list is 'unknown' and stays visible, so an unlisted UK town never silently disappears. Non-UK names stay banked and scored, other markets are coming.

thread_hold._note: One live thread per company, ever. A company is held while any piece for it is in flight or its follow-up sequence is still running; the hold lifts by itself when the thread closes, whatever the outcome. live_results are outcome results that mean a conversation is open; no_response stays live for followup_window_days after the recorded date, then closes.

fullenrich._note: Endpoints reconstructed from FullEnrich's documented API (docs.fullenrich.com; blocked from this container). VERIFY shapes against the live docs on the first keyed run; the client prints every request before sending. Search costs 0.25 credits per person exported; Enrich costs 1 credit per work email / 3 personal / 10 mobile, success-only.

adzuna._note: abm-hiring scrape path: Adzuna UK jobs API (free tier). Needs ADZUNA_APP_ID + ADZUNA_APP_KEY in env or .env; without them the module prints instructions and the paste path still works.
